creator: gelonnov@gmail.com
text:
This report applies to net/ntpsec
I specified in rc.conf
ntpd_program="/usr/local/sbin/ntpd"

In htop I see
/usr/local/sbin/ntpd -d -l /var/log/ntpd.log -p /var/run/ntpd.pid -p /var/db/ntp/ntpd.pid -c /etc/ntp.conf -f /var/db/ntp/ntpd.drift -g

The file /usr/local/etc/rc.d/ntpd is missing.
